22:16 â May 19, 2022
FX Drafts Part Update
Western Union Business Solutions has officially changed its name to Convera. For more information see
this secure site notification
. We updated the FX Drafts Part to reflect the change and published the rebranded forms that Convera has provided to date.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
FX Drafts Part
We updated business references to Convera throughout the Part.
Section 1.3, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources
We updated contact information as applicable for Convera.
